title: Glasses Cleaner Wipes 72 Individually Wrapped Lens Wipes Multipurpose Suitable for Spectacle Lenses, Cameras, Binoculars, Mirrors, Screens, Optical and Electronic Devices
features: ✅ MULTIPURPOSE USE: Ideal for cleaning eyewear, spectacle lenses, cameras, binoculars, mirrors, screens, and other optical or electronic devices and accessories.
✅ SMEAR-FREE CLEANING: Lemon-scented, quick-drying towelette provides a smear-free, streak-free clean without leaving residue, scratches, or streaks on surfaces.
✅ EFFECTIVE FORMULA: Pre-moistened with eco-friendly antiseptic formula, containing 30% alcohol to remove dirt, oil, germs, smudges, and fingerprints, ensuring a thorough clean.
✅ SAFE & GENTLE: Free from ammonia and harmful chemicals, offering a safe and gentle cleaning solution for your devices, ensuring no damage to surfaces or sensitive materials.
✅ CONVENIENT & PORTABLE: Each box contains 72 individually wrapped wipes, each 6x5 inches, making them easy to carry in your pocket, bag, or car for on-the-go cleaning.
description: Product Description Pre-moistened Lens Cleaning Wipes Use our HAADI spectacle wipes and get the spotless, clear gentle, and thorough smudge-free cleaning of your glass surfaces without leaving any residues or lint. Laptop Wipes clean the surfaces effectively and smoothly leaving no marks, streaks, or scratches on the surface. The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. Only use the wipe when moist a dirty or dry wipe can cause scratches. Where I Can use pre-moist Wipes? These are multipurpose wipes, Suitable to be used with eyeglasses, Camera lenses and other general household use. A complete list of products can be accessed from our website along with a product datasheet. Are these suitable to use with contact lenses? These wipes are not suitable to use with contact lenses. Can I use these on naked LCD/LED/Plasma screens? These are not suitable to use with naked screens at all. However, covered/protected screens can be wiped. Can I use these on polish and painted surfaces? Our wipes come with 30% of alcohol, some of the polish/painted surfaces can get damaged with this level of alcohol. Hence, we do not recommend using these with painted and polished surfaces.
